longevity_core.description: Core MeSH terms for longevity/aging relevance

biological_age.search: biological age OR epigenetic clock OR DNA methylation age

whole_body_mri.search: whole body MRI screening OR full body MRI OR total body MRI

vo2max.search: VO2max OR cardiorespiratory fitness OR aerobic capacity

biomarker_testing.search: biomarker panel OR blood biomarker aging OR proteomics aging

liquid_biopsy.search: liquid biopsy cancer screening OR circulating tumor DNA OR ctDNA screening

nad_therapy.search: NAD+ supplementation OR nicotinamide riboside OR NMN

plasmapheresis.search: plasmapheresis aging OR plasma exchange rejuvenation OR young plasma

rapamycin.search: rapamycin aging OR rapalog longevity OR mTOR inhibitor aging

supplement_stack.search: supplement longevity OR nutraceutical aging OR evidence-based supplementation

menopause.search: menopause longevity OR hormone replacement therapy cardiovascular OR perimenopause health

chronic_fatigue.search: chronic fatigue syndrome OR burnout executive OR fatigue biomarker

preventive_check.search: preventive health screening OR health check-up effectiveness OR executive health assessment

sleep_optimization.search: sleep quality mortality OR sleep optimization health OR circadian rhythm aging

cardiovascular_prevention.search: cardiovascular risk prevention OR primary prevention cardiovascular OR ASCVD risk

longevity_medicine.search: longevity medicine OR precision prevention OR proactive health

preventive_screening.search: asymptomatic screening outcome OR health screening healthy adults OR presymptomatic detection benefit OR preventive diagnostics vs symptomatic OR whole body screening incidental findings
